name: SAP on Cloud
description: End-to-end SAP hosting, migration, and operations for S/4HANA on private cloud, AWS, and Azure — delivered by 4,000+ SAP-certified consultants as a RISE with SAP Premium Supplier, enabling enterprises to meet the 2027 S/4HANA migration deadline while maintaining regulatory compliance and reducing total cost of SAP ownership by up to 30%.
positioning: The only RISE with SAP Premium Supplier in Europe with 850,000 managed SAP users and sovereign hosting options — competitors offer SAP migration or sovereign cloud, not both under one contract.
